name: midea-lan
description: Standalone Midea LAN protocol client. Cloud auth (MSmartHome / NetHome Plus / Midea Air), V1/V2/V3 LAN discovery + control, 35+ appliance types.
comment: private: drop this and pick a name + repo URL before publishing. Lifted as-is from ioBroker.midea — no ioBroker imports, only axios and Node built-ins (dgram/net/events/os/crypto).
